_comment: Bob (Intent Agent Model) example config. Copy to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/iam-bob-eino/config.json or ~/.config/iam-bob-eino/config.json, or pass with --config. PLACEHOLDERS ONLY below. API KEYS NEVER GO IN THIS FILE — keys are environment-only (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, MINIMAX_API_KEY); the loader hard-fails on any unknown key, including api_key. Precedence: CLI flags > BOB_* env > provider env (MINIMAX_BASE_URL/MINIMAX_MODEL) > this file > defaults.
